graphs.summary: Twelve weekly bars of migraine days/week with a teal-to-coral color ramp and a 3.4 d/wk weekly average annotation.
90-day daily severity (0–10) sparkline with a faint dashed threshold at 7 and red dots highlighting the five severe spikes.
13 weeks × 7 days calendar heatmap of acute-medication days (26 of 91); pale cells = none, amber cells = taken; legend plus monthly breakdown vs 10 d/mo limit.
Horizontal Pareto of five self-logged triggers (Sleep loss, Stress, Skipped meal, Caffeine change, Hormonal) with descending blue tint.
Two-tone donut showing 71% of the last 90 days were fully functional, with a side breakdown legend and 90-day trend delta.
